name: drivees-rentalcar
description: DriveES — Full-stack car rental management system

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend/auth-service && npm install --prefix backend/car-service && npm install --prefix backend/booking-service && npm install --prefix backend/payment-service && npm install --prefix backend/api-gateway && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "AUTH,CARS,BOOK,PAY,GW,UI" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow,magenta,blue,white" "npm run dev --prefix backend/auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/car-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/booking-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/payment-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/api-gateway" "npm start --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "AUTH,CARS,BOOK,PAY,GW,UI" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow,magenta,blue,white" "npm start --prefix backend/auth-service" "npm start --prefix backend/car-service" "npm start --prefix backend/booking-service" "npm start --prefix backend/payment-service" "npm start --prefix backend/api-gateway" "npm start --prefix frontend"
